title: crepis vesicaria subsp. stellata
intro: Crepis vesicaria subsp. stellata, also known as star-crepis or stellate hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Crepis vesicaria subsp. stellata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
